questions.text: What does the term 'affordance' mean in UX design?
options: The cost of implementing a feature
A visual cue that suggests how an object should be used
The time it takes a user to complete a task
A type of user testing method

questions.text: Which of the following is a key principle of Jakob Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics?
What is the primary purpose of a wireframe?
options: To showcase the final visual design
To outline the structure and layout of a page
The time to recall items from memory
The relationship between target size, distance, and time to reach the target
The maximum number of items in short-term memory
The speed of page load times

questions.text: In a usability test, what is a 'think-aloud' protocol?
options: The facilitator explains each step to the participant
Participants verbalize their thoughts while completing tasks
The team discusses findings after the test
An automated tool that reads page content aloud

questions.text: Which CSS property is used to change the text color of an element?
What is the purpose of the 'alt' attribute on an tag?
options: To provide alternative text for accessibility and when the image fails to load
To add a tooltip on hover

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT a JavaScript data type?

options: A design that responds to user clicks faster
A design that adapts its layout to different screen sizes
A design that uses only CSS Grid
A design that loads in under one second
A database that stores many languages
An AI model trained on vast amounts of text to understand and generate language
A tool for translating between programming languages
The practice of crafting effective inputs to get better outputs from AI models

questions.text: Which of these is an ethical concern with AI-generated content?
options: It can perpetuate biases present in training data

questions.text: What does 'hallucination' mean in the context of AI?
options: The AI generates plausible-sounding but factually incorrect information

questions.text: How can designers best use AI tools in their workflow?
options: Use AI to augment ideation, drafting, and research while applying human judgment
Only use AI for final production assets
